channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-28 20:21 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: How did we get to be $39 trillion in debt? The zombie filibuster—coupled with a chronic unwillingnes...
item.description: How did we get to be $39 trillion in debt? The zombie filibuster—coupled with a chronic unwillingness among senators to break through it by putting in the hard work—has contributed to it substantially. For decades, this dynamic has been giving Senate Democrats way too much power when it comes to spending bills—even when they’re in the minority. Spending bills in the Senate routinely get to 60 votes—regardless of who’s in the majority and who controls the House and the White House—with votes coming from (1) basically every Senate Democrat and (2) a much smaller group of Republicans (predominantly members of the Appropriations Committee), in many cases just a few more than whatever it takes to achieve cloture. As a result, disagreements on spending bills tend to be resolved by simply spending more—to give those voting for it what they need to vote for it. This is one of many reasons why I’ve been pushing so hard on the talking filibuster which, if fully utilized and given the time it needs to work, could help us pass the SAVE America Act. But the benefits wouldn’t end there, as they could help us avoid not only the kind of shutdown hell we’re now experiencing, but also rein in our debt and deficit—at least while Republicans are in charge. Share if you’d like to see the Senate use the talking filibuster—to fully fund DHS, to pass the SAVE America Act, to reduce spending, and otherwise!

item.title: @elonmusk: It is the end of democracy if voter ID is not passed
item.description: It is the end of democracy if voter ID is not passed

item.title: @elonmusk: I know there are a lot of Cybertrucks doing work out there - those using it for business, any feedba...
item.description: I know there are a lot of Cybertrucks doing work out there - those using it for business, any feedback?

item.title: @elonmusk: Stephen Miller says there is not a single verification system in place in Democrat states to receive...
item.description: Stephen Miller says there is not a single verification system in place in Democrat states to receive federal benefits Elon Musk and DOGE tried to warn us…. He says Blue states operate “ENTIRELY ON THE HONOR SYSTEM” He says this is how Democrats put illegals on our benefits “I think what's important for Americans to understand about how pervasive and widespread the fraud is — I think that most citizens probably assume that there's some verification process that takes place for the receipt of most federal benefits. The reality is, is that there is not, this is particularly true in blue states, willfully, true in blue states, in which all of these programs are operated entirely on the honor system” “No verification takes place before individuals are enrolled in or receive these benefits. So as a simple example, if you're a Somali refugee living in Minnesota, you could lie about how many children you have. You could lie about what your immigration status is. You could lie about your marital status. You could lie about child care, you could lie about disability, you could lie about all these things and many more. And nobody in the state of Minnesota would validate any of these facts before writing you a check”

item.title: @elonmusk: What's interesting about Bukele's rule is that it's all so obvious. You can just flip the switch and...
item.description: What's interesting about Bukele's rule is that it's all so obvious. You can just flip the switch and make your country powerful, be beloved by the people, get rich, etc. That this is not widely regarded as something worth striving for shows a deep sickness in Western politics.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk predicts that most of AI compute is going be real-time video understanding and real-time v...
item.description: Elon Musk predicts that most of AI compute is going be real-time video understanding and real-time video generation “we expect to be the leaders in that” Grok is now currently generating more videos and images than everyone else combined “We’re gonna do the same thing with coding and we’re gonna do the same thing with Macrohard”

item.title: @elonmusk: Given that I have built two companies in widely different fields to trillion dollar plus valuations ...
item.description: Given that I have built two companies in widely different fields to trillion dollar plus valuations simultaneously, I am might be getting a few things right once in a while

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship is the path to becoming multiplanetary. Full reusability, in-orbit refueling, and rapid ite...
item.description: Starship is the path to becoming multiplanetary. Full reusability, in-orbit refueling, and rapid iteration are the fundamentals that make regular Mars flights practical not just possible. This is how we extend consciousness beyond one planet.

item.title: @elonmusk: It just keeps getting better and better.@GrokImagine. One year from now it is incomprehensible how f...
item.description: It just keeps getting better and better.@GrokImagine. One year from now it is incomprehensible how far ahead it will be. We are on an amazing journey…

item.description: FSD Supervised handles Amsterdam’s busiest streets with ease

item.title: @elonmusk: Europe will love Tesla self-driving! Due to the extreme regulatory burden of the EU, which in genera...
item.description: Europe will love Tesla self-driving! Due to the extreme regulatory burden of the EU, which in general stifles innovation in Europe, Tesla owners there have been stuck with basic lane-following.

item.title: @elonmusk: The fraudsters always come up with the most sympathetic excuses and do so very loudly, because that ...
item.description: The fraudsters always come up with the most sympathetic excuses and do so very loudly, because that is what swindlers do

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk exposes the critical flaw in ChatGPT and other major AI models: Human Reinforcement Learni...
item.description: Elon Musk exposes the critical flaw in ChatGPT and other major AI models: Human Reinforcement Learning They are literally training the AI to lie.....to ignore what the data actually demands and say whatever is politically correct instead They withhold information. They comment on some things and stay silent on others. They refuse to tell the full truth This is extremely dangerous We don’t need politically correct AI We need truth-seeking AI
